---
title: "Supplementary Figure Report"
subtitle: "Full sweep diagnostics from targets outputs"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-width: 14
    fig-height: 8
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  fig.path: "supplementary_figure_report_files/"
---

## Setup

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(vegan)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(targets)

theme_multipanel <-
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.25),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

format_axis_labels <- function(x) {
  result <- character(length(x))
  for (i in seq_along(x)) {
    val <- x[i]
    if (is.na(val)) {
      result[i] <- NA_character_
    } else if (abs(val) < 1e-10) {
      result[i] <- "0"
    } else if (abs(val) >= 1) {
      result[i] <- sprintf("%.1f", val)
    } else {
      result[i] <- sprintf("%.2f", val)
    }
  }
  result <- stringr::str_replace(result, "(\\.\\d*?)0+$", "\\1")
  result <- stringr::str_replace(result, "\\.$", "")
  result
}

pretty_method_label <- function(method_key) {
  if (startsWith(method_key, "permdisp_")) {
    dm <- sub("^permdisp_", "", method_key)
    if (dm == "bray") return("Bray-Curtis")
    if (dm == "aitchison") return("Aitchison")
    if (dm == "robust.aitchison") return("robust Aitchison")
    if (dm == "jaccard") return("Jaccard")
    if (dm == "hellinger") return("Hellinger")
    return(dm)
  }
  method_key
}

roc_colors_all <- c(
  "Bray-Curtis" = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1")[1],
  "Aitchison" = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1")[2],
  "robust Aitchison" = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1")[3],
  "Jaccard" = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1")[4],
  "Hellinger" = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1")[5]
)
method_levels <- names(roc_colors_all)

coerce_method_levels <- function(x) {
  factor(trimws(as.character(x)), levels = method_levels)
}

cols_prgn_setting5 <- c("non-IBD" = "#E74C3C", "IBD" = "#3498DB")
standard_methods <- c("bray", "aitchison", "robust.aitchison", "jaccard", "hellinger")
standard_method_keys <- paste0("permdisp_", standard_methods)

plot_betadisper_pcoa_and_boxplot <- function(
  bd,
  cols = cols_prgn_setting5,
  p_value = NULL,
  show_group_legend = FALSE
) {
  sites <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(bd, display = "sites"))
  colnames(sites)[1:2] <- c("Axis1", "Axis2")
  sites$group <- factor(bd$group, levels = levels(bd$group))

  centroids <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(bd, display = "centroids"))
  colnames(centroids)[1:2] <- c("Axis1", "Axis2")
  centroids$group <- factor(rownames(centroids), levels = levels(bd$group))

  hull_df <- sites %>%
    dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(\(d, ...) {
      if (nrow(d) < 3) return(d[0, , drop = FALSE])
      idx <- grDevices::chull(d$Axis1, d$Axis2)
      d[idx, , drop = FALSE] %>% dplyr::slice(c(seq_len(n()), 1))
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  seg_df <- sites %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      centroids %>% dplyr::select(group, cx = Axis1, cy = Axis2),
      by = "group"
    )

  p_pcoa <- ggplot() +
    geom_segment(
      data = seg_df,
      aes(x = cx, y = cy, xend = Axis1, yend = Axis2, color = group),
      linewidth = 0.1,
      alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_polygon(
      data = hull_df,
      aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, fill = group, group = group, color = group),
      alpha = 0.15,
      linewidth = 0.1
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = sites,
      aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, color = group, shape = group),
      size = 0.2,
      alpha = 0.8,
      stroke = 0
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = centroids,
      aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, color = group),
      shape = 16,
      size = 0.3,
      stroke = 0
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, guide = if (show_group_legend) "legend" else "none") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("non-IBD" = 16, "IBD" = 17), guide = "none") +
    labs(x = "PCoA 1", y = "PCoA 2") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels) +
    theme_multipanel

  dist_df <- tibble::tibble(
    group = factor(bd$group, levels = c("non-IBD", "IBD")),
    distance = unname(bd$distances)
  )

  ann_label <- NULL
  if (!is.null(p_value) && is.finite(p_value)) {
    ann_label <- if (p_value < 0.001) "p < 0.001" else sprintf("p = %.3f", p_value)
  }

  p_box <- ggplot(dist_df, aes(x = group, y = distance, fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.size = 0.2, alpha = 0.85, linewidth = 0.25, outlier.stroke = 0) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 0.6, alpha = 0.25, stroke = 0) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Distance to centroid") +
    {if (!is.null(ann_label)) annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = Inf, label = ann_label, vjust = 1.1, size = 2.8)} +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_multipanel

  list(pcoa = p_pcoa, box = p_box)
}

plot_da_taxa_sweep_results <- function(fpr_data) {
  fpr_data_with_labels <- fpr_data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(method_label = dplyr::case_when(
      method == "permdisp_bray" ~ "Bray-Curtis",
      method == "permdisp_aitchison" ~ "Aitchison",
      method == "permdisp_robust.aitchison" ~ "robust Aitchison",
      method == "permdisp_robust_aitchison" ~ "robust Aitchison",
      method == "permdisp_jaccard" ~ "Jaccard",
      method == "permdisp_hellinger" ~ "Hellinger",
      TRUE ~ as.character(method)
    )) %>%
    dplyr::filter(method_label %in% method_levels) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      method_label = coerce_method_levels(method_label),
      threshold_label = dplyr::case_when(
        threshold == 0.0 ~ "unfiltered",
        threshold == 0.005 ~ "0.5%",
        threshold == 0.001 ~ "0.1%",
        TRUE ~ as.character(threshold)
      ),
      alpha_val = dplyr::case_when(
        threshold == 0.0 ~ 0.25,
        threshold == 0.005 ~ 1.0,
        threshold == 0.001 ~ 0.55,
        TRUE ~ 1.0
      )
    )

  fpr_col <- if ("FPR" %in% names(fpr_data_with_labels)) "FPR" else "fpr"

  ggplot(fpr_data_with_labels, aes(x = n_da_taxa, y = .data[[fpr_col]], color = method_label, alpha = alpha_val)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.15) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.2, aes(group = interaction(method_label, threshold))) +
    geom_point(size = 1.0, stroke = 0, aes(group = interaction(method_label, threshold))) +
    scale_color_manual(values = roc_colors_all, breaks = method_levels, name = NULL) +
    scale_alpha_identity(guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels, limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(x = "Number of DA taxa", y = "False positive rate") +
    theme_multipanel
}

format_analysis_results_for_plotting <- function(analysis_results, case_label) {
  method_results <- analysis_results$method_results
  method_names <- names(method_results)

  stats <- purrr::imap_dfr(method_results, \(mr, mn) {
    tibble::tibble(
      case = case_label,
      method = mn,
      p_value = mr$p_value
    )
  }) %>% dplyr::mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_names))

  bd_by_method <- purrr::imap(method_results, \(mr, mn) mr$bd)
  distances_long <- purrr::imap_dfr(method_results, \(mr, mn) {
    tibble::tibble(
      sample_id = names(mr$distances),
      group = mr$group,
      distance = mr$distances,
      method = mn
    )
  })

  list(stats = stats, bd_by_method = bd_by_method, distances_long = distances_long)
}

get_sweep_index_with_threshold <- function(jobs_with_threshold, seed, n_da_taxa, threshold) {
  idx <- which(
    jobs_with_threshold$seed == seed &
      jobs_with_threshold$n_da_taxa == n_da_taxa &
      jobs_with_threshold$threshold == threshold
  )
  if (length(idx) != 1) stop("Expected one index; got ", length(idx))
  idx
}

get_sweep_analysis_with_threshold <- function(sweep_res, jobs_with_threshold, seed, n_da_taxa, threshold) {
  sweep_res[[get_sweep_index_with_threshold(jobs_with_threshold, seed, n_da_taxa, threshold)]]
}

plot_methods_row <- function(analysis_fmt, n_label, what = c("pcoa", "box")) {
  what <- match.arg(what)
  plots <- purrr::map(standard_method_keys, \(method_key) {
    bd <- analysis_fmt$bd_by_method[[method_key]]
    if (is.null(bd)) return(ggplot() + theme_void())
    p_val <- analysis_fmt$stats %>% dplyr::filter(method == method_key) %>% dplyr::pull(p_value)
    if (length(p_val) == 0) p_val <- NA_real_
    pb <- plot_betadisper_pcoa_and_boxplot(bd = bd, p_value = p_val, show_group_legend = FALSE)
    base <- if (what == "pcoa") pb$pcoa else pb$box
    base + ggtitle(pretty_method_label(method_key))
  })
  patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, nrow = 1) +
    patchwork::plot_annotation(title = n_label) &
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5))
}

make_do_full_analysis <- function(seed, delta, threshold, sim_params, sccomp_params) {
  intercept_base <- -6
  intercept_disp <- c(intercept_base, intercept_base + delta)

  sim_r <- simulate_case_realistic_taxa(
    slope_vector = rep(0, sim_params$n_taxa),
    mu_inv_softmax = sim_params$mu_inv_softmax_base_realistic,
    log_dispersion_assoc = sccomp_params$k_real,
    intercept_dispersion = intercept_disp,
    sd_log_overdispersion = 0,
    seed = seed,
    n_taxa = sim_params$n_taxa,
    n_samples_per_group = sim_params$n_samples_per_group,
    library_size_mean = sim_params$library_size_mean,
    library_size_sd = sim_params$library_size_sd
  )
  sim_r$count_long <- filter_by_abundance_cases(sim_r$count_long, threshold = threshold)

  if (length(unique(sim_r$count_long$taxon_id)) < 3) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  run_analysis_job(sim_r = sim_r, return_full = TRUE, max_perm = 999, batch = 500, target_se = 0.01)
}
```

```{r targets-load}
targets_script <- file.path(getwd(), "_targets.R")
if (!file.exists(targets_script)) {
  qmd_dir <- dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE))
  targets_script <- file.path(qmd_dir, "_targets.R")
}
targets::tar_config_set(script = targets_script)
source(targets_script)

sccomp_params <- targets::tar_read("sccomp_params")
sim_params <- targets::tar_read("sim_params")
abundance_thresholds <- targets::tar_read("abundance_thresholds")
```

## SD > 0 FPR Sweep (Figure 3 Setting DA_sd)

```{r fpr-sweep-sd-positive, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
fpr_setting_DA_sd <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DA_sd_fpr")
p_fpr_sd <- plot_da_taxa_sweep_results(fpr_setting_DA_sd) +
  ggtitle("FPR sweep with realistic sd_log_overdispersion > 0 (Setting DA_sd)")
print(p_fpr_sd)
```

## Figure 2 Sweep: All PCoAs

```{r figure2-all-pcoa, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_jobs <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_jobs")
delta_values <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_jobs$delta))
seed_fig2 <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_jobs$seed))[1]
threshold_fig2 <- 0.001

for (delta_val in delta_values) {
  analysis <- make_do_full_analysis(
    seed = seed_fig2,
    delta = delta_val,
    threshold = threshold_fig2,
    sim_params = sim_params,
    sccomp_params = sccomp_params
  )
  if (is.null(analysis)) next
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis, case_label = paste0("delta=", delta_val))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 2 sweep PCoA | delta = ", format_axis_labels(delta_val)), what = "pcoa"))
}
```

## Figure 3 Sweep SD = 0: All PCoAs

```{r figure3-sd0-all-pcoa, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold")
sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_res <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_res")
seed_fig3_sd0 <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold$seed))[1]
threshold_fig3 <- 0.001
n_da_values_sd0 <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold$n_da_taxa))

for (n_da in n_da_values_sd0) {
  analysis_raw <- get_sweep_analysis_with_threshold(
    sweep_res = sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_res,
    jobs_with_threshold = sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold,
    seed = seed_fig3_sd0,
    n_da_taxa = n_da,
    threshold = threshold_fig3
  )
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis_raw, case_label = paste0("n_da=", n_da))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 3 SD=0 PCoA | n_DA = ", n_da), what = "pcoa"))
}
```

## Figure 3 Sweep SD > 0 (Realistic): All PCoAs

```{r figure3-sdpos-all-pcoa, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold")
sweep_setting_DA_sd_res <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DA_sd_res")
seed_fig3_sdpos <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold$seed))[1]
n_da_values_sdpos <- sort(unique(sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold$n_da_taxa))

for (n_da in n_da_values_sdpos) {
  analysis_raw <- get_sweep_analysis_with_threshold(
    sweep_res = sweep_setting_DA_sd_res,
    jobs_with_threshold = sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold,
    seed = seed_fig3_sdpos,
    n_da_taxa = n_da,
    threshold = threshold_fig3
  )
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis_raw, case_label = paste0("n_da=", n_da))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 3 SD>0 PCoA | n_DA = ", n_da), what = "pcoa"))
}
```

## Figure 2 Centroid Shift (Scaled Distance, Pre-%)

```{r figure2-centroid-scaled-distance, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_fpr <- targets::tar_read("sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_fpr")

centroid_scaled_data <- sweep_setting_DO_no_sd_fpr %>%
  dplyr::filter(!grepl("^IBD", method, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(delta, method, threshold) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_centroid_sep_pcoa12 = mean(centroid_sep_pcoa12, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_centroid_sep_pcoa12 = sd(centroid_sep_pcoa12, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    method = coerce_method_levels(method),
    alpha_val = dplyr::case_when(
      threshold == 0.0 ~ 0.25,
      threshold == 0.005 ~ 1.0,
      threshold == 0.001 ~ 0.55,
      TRUE ~ 1.0
    )
  )

p_centroid_scaled <- ggplot(centroid_scaled_data, aes(x = delta, y = mean_centroid_sep_pcoa12, color = method, alpha = alpha_val)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_centroid_sep_pcoa12 - se_centroid_sep_pcoa12, ymax = mean_centroid_sep_pcoa12 + se_centroid_sep_pcoa12, fill = method, group = interaction(method, threshold)), alpha = 0.08, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.2, aes(group = interaction(method, threshold))) +
  geom_point(size = 1.0, stroke = 0, aes(group = interaction(method, threshold))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = roc_colors_all, breaks = method_levels, name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = roc_colors_all, guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_identity(guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = format_axis_labels) +
  labs(
    x = "Differential overdispersion (delta)",
    y = "Centroid separation on PCoA 1-2 (scaled distance)"
  ) +
  theme_multipanel

print(p_centroid_scaled)
```

## Figure 2 Sweep: All Distance-to-Centroid Boxplots

```{r figure2-all-boxplots, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
for (delta_val in delta_values) {
  analysis <- make_do_full_analysis(
    seed = seed_fig2,
    delta = delta_val,
    threshold = threshold_fig2,
    sim_params = sim_params,
    sccomp_params = sccomp_params
  )
  if (is.null(analysis)) next
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis, case_label = paste0("delta=", delta_val))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 2 sweep boxplots | delta = ", format_axis_labels(delta_val)), what = "box"))
}
```

## Figure 3 Sweep: All Distance-to-Centroid Boxplots (SD = 0)

```{r figure3-sd0-all-boxplots, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
for (n_da in n_da_values_sd0) {
  analysis_raw <- get_sweep_analysis_with_threshold(
    sweep_res = sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_res,
    jobs_with_threshold = sweep_setting_DA_no_sd_jobs_with_threshold,
    seed = seed_fig3_sd0,
    n_da_taxa = n_da,
    threshold = threshold_fig3
  )
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis_raw, case_label = paste0("n_da=", n_da))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 3 SD=0 boxplots | n_DA = ", n_da), what = "box"))
}
```

## Figure 3 Sweep: All Distance-to-Centroid Boxplots (SD > 0)

```{r figure3-sdpos-all-boxplots, fig.width=18, fig.height=4}
for (n_da in n_da_values_sdpos) {
  analysis_raw <- get_sweep_analysis_with_threshold(
    sweep_res = sweep_setting_DA_sd_res,
    jobs_with_threshold = sweep_setting_DA_sd_jobs_with_threshold,
    seed = seed_fig3_sdpos,
    n_da_taxa = n_da,
    threshold = threshold_fig3
  )
  fmt <- format_analysis_results_for_plotting(analysis_raw, case_label = paste0("n_da=", n_da))
  print(plot_methods_row(fmt, n_label = paste0("Figure 3 SD>0 boxplots | n_DA = ", n_da), what = "box"))
}
```
